instructions.primary_goal:
Fix Polaris loop dispatch to create durable worker evidence before reporting success.

The dispatch command must write packet artifacts to cluster-scoped layout and persist dispatch records with packet/result paths, timestamps, and status before marking a child as dispatched. The status command must display this dispatch evidence.

Branch: philmeaux/pol-201-implement-runtime-state-consolidation-and-cluster-state
steps: Verify active_child is POL-202 in current-state.json
Modify src/loop/checkpoint.ts: Add ChildDispatchRecord interface with dispatch_id, child_id, run_id, cluster_id, packet_path, expected_result_path, dispatched_at, status fields

Modify src/loop/dispatch.ts: Add buildClusterArtifactPaths(), writePacketArtifact(), createDispatchRecord() helpers. Update runLoopDispatch to write packet first, then update state with dispatch_record
Modify src/loop/status.ts: Add findDispatchEvidence() helper. Update runLoopStatus to report dispatch evidence in JSON and human-readable output
Add regression tests in src/loop/dispatch.test.ts: verify packet artifact writing, dispatch_record creation, error handling
Add regression tests in src/loop/status.test.ts: verify dispatch evidence reporting in JSON and human output
Run npm run build and npm test to verify all 311 tests pass
Commit with message: [POL-202] Fix Polaris loop dispatch to create durable worker evidence
Update current-state.json: move POL-202 from open_children to completed_children, add completed_children_meta entry
Append telemetry event: child-completed for POL-202
validation_commands: npm run polaris -- loop status --state-file .taskchain_artifacts/polaris-run/current-state.json --json | grep -q dispatch
acceptance_criteria: dispatch.ts creates dispatch_record in open_children_meta with all required fields
dispatch.ts updates state atomically only after packet is written
status.ts reports dispatch evidence including packet_path, expected_result_path, status, dispatched_at
status.ts shows result_present true/false based on result file existence
Build succeeds with no TypeScript errors
